## HydrationDiagnosticResult.expected property

Structured description of the binding the hydration walk was attempting to apply. The default diagnostic leaves this `undefined`<!-- -->; install `hydrationDebugger()` to populate it.

**Signature:**

```typescript
expected?: HydrationMismatchExpectation | string;
```
